creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Wouter, 
can you please check if ``last'' gives you resoneable output? 
Please check if /var/run/utmp is not of zero length while ``who'' 
does not show you your userid. 
Does ``who'' show anything at all or are you just missing one single 
user session being listed?
